title: A reference methylome database and analysis pipeline to facilitate integrative and comparative epigenomics.
author: Song Q Decato B Hong EE Zhou M Fang F Qu J Garvin T Kessler M Zhou J Smith AD
content: S-EPMC3855694 PMC3855694 A reference methylome database and analysis pipeline to facilitate integrative and comparative epigenomics. DNA methylation is implicated in a surprising diversity of regulatory, evolutionary processes and diseases in eukaryotes. The introduction of whole-genome bisulfite
